    • Constructor Details

      • LSODACommon

        public LSODACommon()

      • LSODACommon

        public LSODACommon(int neq, int mxords, int mxordn)
        LSODACommon constructor
        Parameters:
        neq - the number of equations in the ODE system
        mxords - maximum order of stiff method
        mxordn - maximum order of nonstiff method
